testcase.name: test_doula_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response missing user/token assert ('user' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...} or 'token' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_doula_midwife_routes_phase7.py:63: in test_doula_login_success assert "user" in data or "token" in data, "Login response missing user/token" E AssertionError: Login response missing user/token E assert ('user' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...} or 'token' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...})

testcase.name: test_midwife_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response missing user/token assert ('user' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...} or 'token' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_doula_midwife_routes_phase7.py:74: in test_midwife_login_success assert "user" in data or "token" in data, "Login response missing user/token" E AssertionError: Login response missing user/token E assert ('user' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...} or 'token' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...})

testcase.name: test_mom_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response missing user/token assert ('user' in {'email': 'demo.mom@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emma Johnson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emma Johnson&size=200', ...} or 'token' in {'email': 'demo.mom@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emma Johnson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emma Johnson&size=200', ...})

testcase.name: test_get_doula_profile_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_doula_midwife_routes_phase7.py:108: in test_get_doula_profile_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get doula profile failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get doula profile failed: 401 - {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_doula_profile_requires_doula_role

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 for MOM accessing doula profile, got 401 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_doula_midwife_routes_phase7.py:130: in test_get_doula_profile_requires_doula_role assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for MOM accessing doula profile, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for MOM accessing doula profile, got 401 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
